items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the capability to upload photos/videos for testimonials as part of the feedback collection process. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. Therefore, the validation cannot be completed, leading to a blocked status due to inconclusive evidence.
